title: eleocharis fassettii
intro: Eleocharis fassettii, also known as Fassett's spikerush, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Eleocharis fassettii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and promote digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Eleocharis fassettii can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to enhance their effects.
